data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Comprehensive data encryption is enforced both at rest and in transit.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security by requiring more than one form of verification.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network traffic for suspicious activities and responds to potential threats.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Requires verification of every device and user trying to access resources in the network.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security audits to identify vulnerabilities and patch potential risks.
